channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. to slap 50% tariffs on Canadian goods
item.description: The Trump administration announced Monday it will impose an additional 50% tariff on certain Canadian goods, including hockey sticks, wine, and cement.

item.title: Trump's 'public charge' rule changes health test for green cards
item.description: The Trump administration announced plans to consider immigrants' use of programs like Medicaid when deciding green card eligibility.

item.title: Trump meets Lebanon's president as Israel begins first pullback
item.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun meets President Trump as Israeli forces start their first withdrawal.

item.title: Group pushes for whites-only 'heritage communities' across US
item.description: A white separatist group is openly planning a network of whites-only settlements across rural America.
